default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and implementation progress.](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First article live; 10 more ready for upload pending images](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Automated tagging implemented to resolve incorrect tag issues](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [In-text image workflow still in progress; current AI-generated images acceptable for now](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Programmatic publishing and improved interlinking strategies discussed as future enhancements](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

## Topics

### Content Upload and Scheduling

  - [10 articles ready for upload, pending image additions](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Agreed to upload 4-5 articles twice a week initially](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Adrian to review articles before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Jenn working on adding code samples using Carbon tool for image conversion](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)

### Image Integration

  - [Current AI-generated images deemed suitable as placeholders](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Kyle mentioned future plans for programmatic image identification and integration](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Copyright concerns noted for image selection](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

### Tagging and Workflow Improvements

  - [Automated tagging implemented to resolve incorrect tag issues](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Daniel working on in-text images workflow, expected progress next week](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### Interlinking Strategy

  - [Adrian emphasized importance of interlinking new articles with existing content](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Kyle suggested focusing on high page authority content for impactful interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Manual interlinking process to be implemented in the short term](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)

### Future Enhancements

  - [GrowthX closing Series A funding, planning to build their own "10 OS" solution](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Programmatic publishing feature in development, aiming to reduce manual workload](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Exploring AI-driven image selection and integration for future implementation](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to upload 4-5 articles twice a week, starting with the 10 ready articles](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Adrian to review and publish uploaded articles](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Monitor analytics of published articles for crawling and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Implement manual interlinking process, focusing on high page authority content](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Continue discussions on future enhancements like programmatic publishing and improved image integration](https://fathom.video/share/xmbRxf1tPpovmKFo_9oZ69XNJUNBQjaf?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

action_items.description: Add images to 10 ready articles; upload to system; mark Adrian as reviewer
Upload articles in batches (4-5) over next week; schedule publish dates
Review uploaded articles once notified; check Zuplo mentions & link accuracy
Manually interlink new programmatically-created articles w/ existing high PA content
